title: Todo
description: A Simple Client Side Todo List Mod
body:
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1326668?logo=curseforge&label=Downloads&color=E07C00&style=plastic)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/todo) [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/todo?style=plastic&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth%20Downloads)](https://modrinth.com/mod/todo) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-View%20Source-181717?style=plastic&logo=github)](https://github.com/spacemex/Todo)

Simple Todo List Mod

A simple client-side only todo list mod for Minecraft. Add and manage tasks with ease!

  • Opens with a configurable keybind (default: 'G').
  • 32 character limit per todo due to Mojang's text field input.
  • Click a todo to remove it.
    •    ![ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09f2da287f640f22b4dc10e0a6fc30f481e40cbd.png)
